code.title: Remix Route Conventions
items: Use file-based routing in the app/routes/ directory
Export a default component, a loader function, and/or an action function from each route module
Use loader for data fetching (GET); use action for mutations (POST, PUT, DELETE)
Use the useFetcher hook for non-navigation form submissions and data reloads
Use the useLoaderData hook to access loader data in the component

code.title: Remix Data Patterns
items: Prefer server-side data loading in loaders over client-side fetching
Use Remix's built-in Form component for progressive enhancement
Handle errors in errorBoundary exports per route
Use session storage for authentication state

testing.title: Remix Testing
items: Use Vitest for unit tests of loaders, actions, and utilities
Use React Testing Library for component tests
Use Playwright or Cypress for end-to-end tests
Test loaders and actions as plain async functions without mounting the full app
